polities.name: Frankish Empire
polities.notes: Charlemagne crowned Holy Roman Emperor 800 CE. Split by Treaty of Verdun 843.

polities.name: Byzantine Empire
polities.notes: Survived until fall of Constantinople 1453.

polities.name: Abbasid Caliphate
polities.notes: Replaced Umayyad Caliphate. Ended with Mongol sack of Baghdad 1258.

polities.name: Umayyad Caliphate
polities.notes: Overthrown by Abbasid Revolution 750. Umayyad emirate survived in Al-Andalus.

polities.name: Umayyad Emirate of Córdoba
polities.notes: Became Caliphate of Córdoba in 929.

polities.name: Caliphate of Córdoba
polities.notes: Fragmented into taifa kingdoms 1031.

polities.name: Holy Roman Empire
polities.notes: Founded by Otto I. Complex feudal structure, not a centralized state.

polities.name: Kingdom of England
polities.notes: Unified by Æthelstan 927. Became Kingdom of Great Britain 1707.

polities.name: Kingdom of France
polities.notes: Capetian dynasty from 987. Became Republic 1792.

polities.name: Mongol Empire
polities.notes: Largest contiguous land empire. Fragmented into Khanates.

polities.name: Tang Dynasty
polities.notes: Golden age of Chinese civilization.

polities.name: Song Dynasty
polities.notes: Northern Song fell to Jin dynasty 1127; Southern Song ended 1279.

polities.name: Roman Empire
polities.notes: Western Roman Empire fell 476 CE. Eastern continued as Byzantine Empire.

polities.name: Ottoman Empire
polities.notes: Founded by Osman I. Succeeded by Republic of Turkey 1923.

polities.name: Kievan Rus
polities.notes: Fragmented into principalities; destroyed by Mongol invasion 1237-1242.

polities.name: Kingdom of Poland
polities.notes: Crowned kingdom 1025. Merged with Lithuania 1569.

polities.name: Kingdom of Hungary
polities.notes: Founded by Stephen I 1000. Part of Habsburg Empire from 1526.

polities.name: Kingdom of Denmark
polities.notes: One of the oldest monarchies.

polities.name: Kingdom of Norway
polities.notes: United under Harald Fairhair ~872.

polities.name: Kingdom of Sweden
polities.notes: Great Power in 17th century.

polities.name: Kingdom of Asturias
polities.notes: Christian successor state in northern Iberia after Umayyad conquest.

polities.name: Duchy of Bavaria
polities.notes: Part of Frankish realm from 788; later part of HRE.

polities.name: Duchy of Saxony
polities.notes: Incorporated into Frankish Empire by Charlemagne.

polities.name: Khazar Khaganate
polities.notes: Turkic semi-nomadic state north of the Caucasus.

polities.name: First Bulgarian Empire
polities.notes: Founded 681 on Danube delta; conquered by Byzantium 1018.
